display.purpose: Landing headlines and major intro states only.

headline.purpose: Page titles and major section headings.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel titles, and compact product headings.

body.purpose: Dense product copy, table support text, and modal explanations.

label.purpose: Section tags, addresses, code-like metadata, and compact markers.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Default cards, compact filters, and neutral buttons.

shadows.name: surface-hover
shadows.purpose: Button hover and small elevated feedback.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Dropdown and menu open or close feedback.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Buttons, compact filters, hover states, and control feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action with Monarch Orange, compact height, low radius, and quiet hover lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; min-width: 80px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #f45f2d; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-in-out, filter 200ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-in-out, transform 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, #f45f2d 85%, transparent); filter: brightness(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); filter: brightness(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #f45f2d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Neutral action for secondary commands on app surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; min-width: 80px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #16181a; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-in-out, filter 200ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-in-out, transform 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-default:hover { background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.7); filter: brightness(0.95); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-btn-default:active { transform: scale(0.98); filter: brightness(0.9); } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid rgb(244 95 45 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filled Input
components.description: Compact filled field for filters, search, and modal forms.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-label" for="ds-input">Market search</label><input class="ds-input-filled" id="ds-input" placeholder="Search markets..." />
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; color: #8e8e8e; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input-filled { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 0; border-radius: 2px; background: #f6f8fb; color: #16181a; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-in-out, background-color 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-input-filled::placeholder { color: #8e8e8e; } .ds-input-filled:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgb(244 95 45 / 0.5); } .ds-input-filled:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Working surface for charts, feed sections, headers, and compact panels.
components.html:
Oracle Risk

Inspect provider exposure and market concentration without hiding the underlying inputs.
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #16181a; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; color: #8e8e8e; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Header Navigation Link
components.description: Top bar route link with text-only active indicator.
components.html: MarketsAutovault
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; height: 56px; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; padding: 4px 12px; color: #f45f2d; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: rgb(244 95 45 / 0.8); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12px; right: 12px; bottom: -4px; height: 1.5px; background: transparent; transition: background-color 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-nav-link-active::after { background: #f45f2d; } .ds-nav-divider { width: 0; height: 16px; border-left: 1px dashed rgb(142 142 142 / 0.2); }

components.name: Section Tag
components.description: Mono bracket label used on landing and section headers.
components.css: .ds-section-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 8px; border: 1px solid rgb(244 95 45 / 0.2); border-radius: 6px; color: rgb(244 95 45 / 0.8); font-family: 'Victor Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Compact Filter Control
components.description: Surface control used in market filters for search, network, assets, and oracle selectors.
components.css: .ds-filter-control { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border: 0; border-radius: 2px; background: #ffffff; color: #16181a; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-filter-control span { color: #8e8e8e; } .ds-filter-control:hover { background: #f6f8fb; } .ds-filter-control:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid rgb(244 95 45 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.description: Low-radius overlay menu used by navigation, settings, and compact actions.
components.css: .ds-dropdown { min-width: 160px; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 2px; background: #ffffff; color: #16181a; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-dropdown-item { display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 2px; background: transparent; color: #16181a; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-dropdown-item:hover, .ds-dropdown-item:focus-visible { background: #f6f8fb; outline: none; }

components.name: Highlighted Checkbox
components.description: Acknowledgement row for risk or confirmation flows.
components.css: .ds-checkbox-highlighted { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgb(244 95 45 / 0.2); border-radius: 2px; background: rgb(244 95 45 / 0.05); color: #8e8e8e; font-family: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-checkbox-highlighted:hover { background: rgb(244 95 45 / 0.1); } .ds-checkbox-box { display: grid; place-content: center; width: 16px; height: 16px; flex: 0 0 16px; border: 1px solid #f45f2d; border-radius: 2px; background: #f45f2d; color: #ffffff; } .ds-checkbox-box svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

narrative.overview:
Monarch is a restrained product interface for people who already understand that DeFi lending carries real tradeoffs. The current design works because it feels like a clean workbench: structured, data-forward, low-drama, and precise. Future work should preserve that character before adding any new visual idea.

The system uses light and dark technical neutrals, low-radius components, sparse Monarch Orange, dashed grid texture, and compact table-first layouts. It should feel useful to advanced DeFi users, Morpho power users, and fund managers who prefer control over persuasion.

It explicitly rejects the PRODUCT.md anti-references: a simple retail dashboard, hype-heavy crypto funnel, toy-like yield app, persuasive UX-maxi product, deposit-pressure patterns, exaggerated emotional copy, gamified yield chasing, and over-simplified risk presentation.
keyCharacteristics: Dense enough for repeated market analysis, but clean enough to scan.
Existing components are the default vocabulary; new surfaces should extend them, not replace them.
Orange is reserved for primary action, selection, active state, and meaningful grid energy.
Tables, filters, breadcrumbs, modals, and settings panels should remain familiar product UI.
Landing-page grid accents may be expressive, but product surfaces stay neutral and task-first.

rules.name: The Preservation Rule
rules.body: Document the current design before changing it. Do not redesign Monarch by inventing a new theme, component library, or interaction language unless the task explicitly asks for that.

rules.name: The Orange Has Weight Rule
rules.body: Monarch Orange must stay rare. If a screen starts to look orange, the accent has failed.

rules.name: The Neutral Surface Rule
rules.body: Prefer background, surface, hover, border, and muted text tokens before adding new hues.

rules.name: The Grid Is Infrastructure Rule
rules.body: Dot grids and dashed borders should feel like measurement marks and table structure, not decoration pasted on top.

rules.name: The Quiet Type Rule
rules.body: Do not create drama through type. Use weight, size, and spacing for hierarchy, not oversized labels or display type inside controls.

rules.name: The Mono Marker Rule
rules.body: Victor Mono is a signal for technical metadata and brackets, not a replacement body font.

rules.name: The Flat At Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces should look stable before interaction. Add lift for state or overlay priority, not for decoration.

rules.name: The Dark Mode Border Rule
rules.body: In dark mode, low-contrast borders do more work than shadows. Preserve that choice.

dos: Do preserve the current component library first: `button`, `card`, `input`, `table`, `dropdown-menu`, `select`, `tabs`, `modal`, and filter components are the default vocabulary.
Do keep Monarch Orange sparse and meaningful: primary actions, active states, focus, checked state, and grid activation.
Do keep product surfaces dense, neutral, and table-first for expert workflows.
Do use low-radius controls, subtle borders, faint grid texture, and quiet shadows exactly because they make the interface feel precise.
Do make risk, oracle, liquidity, collateral, and rate context visible without turning it into sales copy.
Do respect reduced motion and keep motion tied to state, reveal, or feedback.
donts: Don't make Monarch feel like a simple retail dashboard.
Don't make Monarch feel like a hype-heavy crypto funnel.
Don't make Monarch feel like a toy-like yield app.
Don't make Monarch feel like a persuasive UX-maxi product that nudges users into action before they are ready.
Don't add deposit-pressure patterns, exaggerated emotional copy, gamified yield chasing, or over-simplified risk presentation.
Don't replace the current visual system with a new theme, new radius scale, new typography system, or new component vocabulary during routine feature work.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, identical marketing-card grids, or modal-first design as a default.
Don't add heavy color to inactive states, especially full-saturation orange.
Don't extend colored side-stripe accents beyond the existing table row orientation pattern.
